name: Luna
description: A sophisticated tuxedo cat who loves lounging in sunbeams and floral pillows.

description: A curious kitten who enjoys exploring cozy corners and playing hide-and-seek.

description: A bonded pair of best friends. Perfect for those who want double the cuddles.

description: A gentle brown calf with an inquisitive nature. Ideal for farm-style therapy days.

name: Bessie
description: An incredibly chill black-and-white calf who is a professional couch potato.

description: A sweet, fluffy companion who comes with his own custom-built indoor balcony.

description: A stunning dapple grey horse who is clearly very fond of their own reflection.
